dialogue_lines.text: The river is rising. We must move the camp before nightfall or we lose everything. Follow me — I know a cave in the northern cliffs.
dialogue_lines.context: Player approaches river camp during flood event

dialogue_lines.text: Winter is coming early this year. The mammoths have already moved south. If we do not follow the herds, we will starve before the first snow melts.
dialogue_lines.context: Player reaches the herd migration path — triggers seasonal survival quest

dialogue_lines.text: I have seen what those claws can do to a man. We do not hunt the pack hunters alone. Not ever. You want to survive out here — you learn that rule first.
dialogue_lines.context: Player encounters veteran hunter near raptor territory on north cliff

dialogue_lines.text: The bone tools are wearing down. We need flint from the quarry before we can make new spear tips. Without better weapons, the next hunt will fail.
dialogue_lines.context: Player reaches quarry — triggers crafting resource quest

notes: All 4 TriggerBox volumes spawned in MinPlayableMap. Audio URLs ready for Audio Agent #16 integration.
